message:
fix(node): cap slash fraction at 100% and saturating_add in receipt chain resume

- staking_governance: cap `fraction` at `.min(100)` to prevent slashing
  more than 100% of a stake when custom policy sets fraction > 100
- receipt_chain: use `saturating_add(1)` instead of `+ 1` on
  `end_index as usize` in `resume_from_snapshot()` for defense-in-depth

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
